scenario_name: Scenario 13 — Async Implementation with Error Propagation
justification: All 6 pass criteria met: sequential calls (fraud before gateway, no Promise.all), AC6 explicitly tested with gateway mock verified not called on fraud detection, AC4/AC5 error chaining via cause property with identity checks, AC3 preserves decline reason, all 6 ACs tested with mocks, acceptance_criteria_coverage maps all 6 ACs.

observations.text: Call ordering verified via side-effect log array, stronger than simple call count checks
AC2 and AC6 tested together with dedicated assertion that gateway.charge was never called
Error chaining uses identity check (error.cause === networkError) not just truthy check
AC3 includes edge case test for absent declineReason with fallback
12 tests across all 6 ACs with multiple scenarios per criterion
